name: Wam Income Maximiser Limited
analysis: WMX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.6450. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.6750, stop A$1.5989, target A$1.9034 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
